name: mtg-commander-deckbuilder
description: Build Bracket-3 Commander/EDH decks from your Magic: The Gathering collection, with Claude as the deckbuilding brain. Imports a Moxfield collection, pulls EDHREC + Scryfall + Commander Spellbook data, hand-authors two decks (best-owned + optimal), and outputs a self-contained interactive HTML report plus Moxfield-importable lists.
